name: Transaction Coordinator Service
next_task: Enter live IMAP, GLVAR, and eXp Okta secrets via the agent intake workspace or TC access bootstrap flow, then run the first real intake for 6453 Mahogany Peak (Pam Patterson)
current_focus: TC access readiness/bootstrap and the intake workspace now exist; the next move is entering live secrets and running the first real email-driven intake for 6453 Mahogany Peak
completion_checks: TC access readiness route accurately reports missing/present IMAP and vault-backed browser credentials
Agent portal without a transaction id shows the intake workspace with readiness, triage, and suggested transaction matches
Email triage stores preview text and message identity when enrichment columns are available, improving workspace routing quality
First live transaction (6453 Mahogany Peak) created and tracked in DB
Email triage picks up TC-related emails and routes to correct transaction
Deadline tracker fires reminders at correct intervals
Agent portal accessible and shows transaction status
GLVAR dues check runs monthly without manual intervention
Billing tracks per-transaction and subscription revenue
anti_drift_notes: TC coordinator uses SkySlope for document management via Okta SSO browser automation. The Gmail credentials for TC email access are stored as Railway variables (email address as key, password as value). SkySlope automation requires Puppeteer on Railway — not yet deployed.

decision_debt.description: TC access bootstrap and readiness now exist, but live IMAP password plus GLVAR and eXp Okta credentials still need to be entered before first real intake
SkySlope browser automation (Puppeteer) not yet deployed on Railway
Billing/Stripe integration not wired to TC plan tiers yet
